svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="技术深耕三大模块" id="tech-deep"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-142" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="ROOT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="前端技术深耕" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="370" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="前端框架
Vue3 底层原理：响应式、虚拟DOM、组件通信" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="250" x="40" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务端与中间层
Node.js + Egg.js/Express：异步原理、中间件设计、接口聚合" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="250" x="325" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="工程化与性能
Webpack/Vite 构建原理、优化；数据流优化、首屏渲染" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="250" x="610" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="延伸
TypeScript 类型系统
封装通用组件库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="250" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="延伸
BFF 层设计、跨域方案、接口容错" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="250" x="325" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="延伸
多端适配（Taro/uniapp/flutter）
缓存策略" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="250" x="610" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2B" edge="1" parent="1" source="ROOT" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="前端框架"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2C" edge="1" parent="1" source="ROOT" target="C" value="中间层"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R2D" edge="1" parent="1" source="ROOT" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="D" value="工程化与性能"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B2B1" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C1" value="延伸"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D2D1" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="D1" value="延伸"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
